creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Which version of FreeBSD, exactly? 

freebsd-version -kru ; uname -aKU

Packages from latest, or quarterly? 

pkg -vv | grep -e url -e enabled -e priority


(In reply to Deniz Gezmis from comment #0)

Please tell more about the crash. 

Is it reproducible? If so, in what situation does it occur? 


Compare with other reported crashes (keyword: crash) for graphics/gimp-app: 

<https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/buglist.cgi?component=Individual+Port%28s%29&keywords=crash&keywords_type=allwords&list_id=539634&order=Bug+Number&product=Ports+%26+Packages&query_format=advanced&resolution=---&short_desc=graphics%2Fgimp-app&short_desc_type=allwordssubstr>
